headline: Aaron Judge hits 3-run homer in win over Red Sox
body: Judge went 2-for-4 with a three-run homer in Tuesday's win. He now has 5 homers on the young season.

headline: Mookie Betts day-to-day with sore hamstring
body: Betts was removed from Tuesday's game with hamstring tightness. He is considered day-to-day.

headline: Gerrit Cole dominates with 10 K's over 7 innings
body: Cole allowed just one run on three hits across seven innings while striking out 10.

headline: Judge expected to bat cleanup on Opening Day
body: Manager Aaron Boone confirmed Judge will bat fourth in the Opening Day lineup.
